_comment: Global site configuration for ApxWiki. Key-value pairs used by build.py.
site_description: A collection of Wikipedia-style reference articles documenting the history of Appomattox County, Virginia.
site_tagline: A community encyclopedia of Appomattox County, Virginia history.
site_sources: Generated from local newspaper archives, government meeting minutes, and public records.
author: Nathan Simpson

alerts.message: These articles were generated by AI. In my opinion, most articles are roughly 90% correct, but some key details are obviously misstated or lack attribution. Consider these articles as a general, anecdotal history and not comprehensive / absolute truth. — Nathan Simpson
